source_id.description: The ID of the source item

source_type.description: Specifies the class name of the source item, such as Biocollections::Plasmid

target_id.description: The ID of the target item

target_type.description: Specifies the class name of the target item, such as Biocollections::Antibody

source_uuid.description: The UUID of the source item

target_uuid.description: The UUID of the target item
